title: 3Pcs Silicone Air Fryer Liners for Hot Air Fryer 19-23 cm, Airfryer Accessories for Tefal Easy Fry Max 5L, Ninja AF180UK Max Pro 6.2L,Russell Hobbs 8L,Cosori TurboBlaze 6L,Philips 6.2L NA230
features: 【Compatible with Silicone Liners Hot Air Fryer】 These silicone air fryer liners designed for the Ninja hot air fryer Max Pro 6.2L AF180UK/ AF181, Philips NA230 6.2L, Cosori TurboBlaze 5.5L / 6.0L / 6.2L, Cecotec 6L, Tefal EY8018 6.5L / EY2458 5L and Russel Hobbs 27170-56 8L, compatible with Ninja 4.7L AF140UK / AF141. Fit for air fryer inner size 19 cm - 23 cm.

【Reusable Premium Air Fryer Liners】 We focus on your health, so the air fryer inserts are made of food-grade silicone material, BPA-free, non-toxic, scratch-resistant, wear-resistant, and tear-resistant.
【Easy to Clean】 Our silicone air fryer accessories are easy to clean and can be washed by hand or in the dishwasher, so you can say goodbye to the sticky mess.
【Practical Air Fryer Inserts】 Reusable Silicone air fryer liners includes 3*silicone air fryer liners. Cook two separate dishes simultaneously or one large meal with ease.

【Heat Resistance】 Silicone air fryer liners protect the inner pot, and keeps food from scorching and sticking to the bottom of the pan. Can withstand high temperatures up to 446°F (230°C). Must-have air fryer accessories.
【Wide Application】 Silicone air fryer moulds are not only suitable for air fryers,but also for microwave ovens, barbecues, steamers, baking and placing food, etc.
